instruction: 把会议跟进事项记录一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '事项'
ws['B1'] = '负责人'
ws['C1'] = '截止日期'
ws['D1'] = '状态'
ws['A2'] = '更新产品文档'
ws['B2'] = '赵雷'
ws['C2'] = '2025-03-15'
ws['D2'] = '完成'
ws['A3'] = '安排客户演示'
ws['B3'] = '孙梅'
ws['C3'] = '2025-03-20'
ws['D3'] = '进行中'
ws['A4'] = '提交预算申请'
ws['B4'] = '周斌'
ws['C4'] = '2025-03-18'
ws['D4'] = '逾期'
ws['A5'] = '组织团建活动'
ws['B5'] = '钱琳'
ws['C5'] = '2025-04-01'
ws['D5'] = '未开始'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/meeting_followup.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把会议跟进事项记录一下
从/home/user/Desktop/meeting_followup.xlsx中找到状态为'逾期'的事项，在/home/user/Desktop/action_items.txt末尾追加：'逾期事项：提交预算申请（负责人：周斌）'，保存

include: 逾期事项：提交预算申请
